auth.verified: You have to verify your email
auth.accountLocked: Account is temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts
auth.userIdOrEmailMustBeProvided: User ID or email must be provided
auth.tokenNotFound: Refresh token not found in database
auth.tokenRevoked: Refresh token has been revoked. Possible token theft detected!
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must contain at least 12 characters
auth.passwordNotConfigured: User does not have a password
auth.resetTokenInvalidOrExpired: Password reset token is invalid or expired

logout.failed: Logout failed or token already revoked

magicLink.expiredOrUsed: Magic link has expired or already been used
magicLink.userNotFound: User not found for magic link
magicLink.requestSent: If an account exists with this email, a magic link has been sent.

oauth.providerNotLinked: OAuth provider is not linked to this account
oauth.userNotFound: User not found for OAuth identity
oauth.cannotRemoveLastMethod: Cannot remove last authentication method. Please set a password first or keep at least one OAuth provider linked.
oauth.alreadyLinked: OAuth provider is already linked to this account
oauth.accountAlreadyLinked: This OAuth account is already linked to another user
